docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY EXTRA SPACE STORAGE AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, VIDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TRICIA THOMAS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2026BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE STORAGE IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS TRICIA THOMAS. DEFENDANT VIDA BONILLA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-15-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, VIDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE STORAGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONILLA, VIDA $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,340.00, AND MAY RETAKE POSSESSION OF THEIR UNIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
